nodes.name: Error Trigger
nodes.notes: All 5 workflows set errorWorkflow = this workflow. Catches any unhandled exception.

nodes.name: Log Error to Audit Table
nodes.notes: Every error is permanently logged for debugging and GDPR audit trail

nodes.name: Notify Customer of Error
nodes.notes: Customer always gets a response — never left hanging in silence

nodes.name: Alert Team on Slack
nodes.notes: Optional — remove if not using Slack. Replace with email or PagerDuty as needed.
